page_metadata.biotools__summary: CryoVR is a virtual reality training tool designed at Purdue University to familiarize users with cryoEM equipment, such as microscopes and sample preparation equipment, through a safe and accessible, virtual environment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CryoVR is a virtual reality training tool designed at Purdue University to familiarize users with cryoEM equipment, such as microscopes and sample preparation equipment, through a safe and accessible, virtual environment.
